files.notes: This file contains a single article titled 'Mothers in Israel' which includes biographical sketches of two pioneer women: Margaret McIntire Burgess (with her personal reminiscences) and Ansine Marie Larsen Peterson. The article appears to be complete and self-contained, matching the contents listing which shows 'Mothers in Israel' as a single entry on page 11.

splits.title: A 200 Year Calendar
splits.start_boundary: A 200-Year Calendar: Many people have an interest

files.notes: This file contains only the A 200 Year Calendar article as listed in the contents. The text is heavily corrupted with OCR errors, especially in the calendar tables, but represents a single continuous article providing a perpetual calendar system for determining days of the week for dates between 1776-1978.

splits.start_boundary: Peace I Leave With You. Lucy May

files.notes: The first section continues Guide Lessons content covering ancient history (Alexandria, Carthage, etc.) and home economics topics. The second section is clearly a separate poem by Lucy May Green as listed in the contents. There appears to be an advertisement at the very end that should be included with the poem section.
